name: gnomad
description: gnomAD — Genome Aggregation Database. Allele frequencies for human variants, gene constraint metrics (pLI, LOEUF), structural variants, and variant search by gene or region. The canonical population-frequency reference for clinical variant interpretation. Backed by the public gnomAD GraphQL API (https://gnomad.broadinstitute.org/api) — no auth. Vendored from the google-deepmind/science-skills bundle.
author: zorai

get-gene-constraint.description: Get gene constraint metrics (pLI, LOEUF, oe_lof, oe_mis) for a gene symbol. Use to assess loss-of-function / missense intolerance.

python.command: python scripts/get_gene_constraint.py --gene "${GNMD_GENE:?set GNMD_GENE (gene symbol, e.g. PCSK9)}" --output "${GNMD_OUTPUT:?set GNMD_OUTPUT (output file path)}"

get-variant-frequency.description: Get allele frequency for a single variant by chrom-pos-ref-alt ID or rsID. Use for clinical variant interpretation alongside ClinVar.

search-variants.description: Search variants by gene symbol, by genomic region (chrom/start/end), or filtered by consequence (pLoF, missense, etc.).
